Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Records
Off Calendar Nov-03-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS J.J'S MAE, INC DBA RAINBEAU and MARC BUSSIN'S Motion To Seal Records.

Defendants' unopposed motion to seal records is granted. The motion complies with California Rules of Court, Rules 2.550 and 2.551. The Court finds that there exists an overriding interest that overcomes the right of public access to the portions of the records to be sealed; the overriding interest supports sealing those records; a substantial probability exists that the overriding interest will be prejudiced if the record is not sealed; the proposed sealing is narrowly tailored; and no less restrictive means exist to achieve the overriding interest.

Counsel for the defendants is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats the court's findings and specifies the documents or portion of documents to be filed under seal and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
